name: rejoinbi-platform
description: Operate Rejoin BI tenants, workspaces, uploads, BI projects, ECharts publishing, and safe production cleanup from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Develop and publish Rejoin BI dashboards.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex connect to Rejoin BI tenants, list workspaces, validate protected workspaces, upload app files, publish BI/ECharts projects, and safely preview workspace/page cleanup using the platform API.
defaultPrompt: Preview deleting this Rejoin BI workspace
